specs.title: Create a new agent with tools and guardrails (E5c-4 AC-1, AC-2)

annotations.description: No model options in dropdown — GET /ai/admin/models returns 404 (route not registered on backend)
No prompt options in dropdown — GET /ai/admin/prompts returns 404 (route not registered on backend). promptId is REQUIRED for agent creation.
No POST response — form submission was likely blocked by client-side validation (promptId required but prompt dropdown empty due to API 404)
Backend AI admin API routes return 404 — routes are not registered in the Fastify app. All /ai/admin/* and /system/companies endpoints return "Route not found" for authenticated requests.

error.message:
Error: Agent creation failed. Root cause: backend API routes for AI admin are not registered (all return 404). The frontend UI is correctly built (pages, forms, tabs all work) but cannot save data. API errors: [404 GET http://localhost:5110/api/v1/system/companies; 404 GET http://localhost:5110/api/v1/ai/admin/dashboard; 404 GET http://localhost:5110/api/v1/ai/admin/dashboard; 404 GET http://localhost:5110/api/v1/ai/automations?limit=200; 404 GET http://localhost:5110/api/v1/ai/automations/runs?status=FAILED&dateFrom=2026-03-02T19%3A11%3A02.911Z&limit=200]

[2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoBe[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m) // Object.is equality[22m

Expected: [32mtrue[39m
Received: [31mfalse[39m
